issues.sample: I WAS STOPPED IN TRAFFIC WHEN I WAS REAR ENDED BY A DRIVER DOING APPROXIMATELY 50 MPH ON A 3 LANE PARKWAY, WHICH CAUSED ME TO CRASH INTO THE CAR RIGHT IN FRONT OF ME.  THE COLLISION WAS VIOLENT ENOUGH TO CAUSE BRUISING ON MY BICEP AND UPPER THIGHS AND KNOCKED MY HEARING AIDS ONTO

LOST OF ACCELERATION OR SUDDEN ACCELERATION,   HELLO, I PURCHASED THIS MITSUBISHI MIRAGE 2017, AND I DROVE IT FOR 2000 MILES. I HAVE NOTICED THE LOST OF ACCELERATION OR SOMETIMES SUDDEN ACCELERATION WITHOUT PRESSING THE ACCELERATOR.   I AM REPORTING MY MITSUBISHI TO BE ON THE SAF

narrative.headline: What 2017 Mitsubishi Mirage owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 28 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
